name: recourse_evaluate_terraform
description: Evaluate a Terraform plan for destructive consequences BEFORE running terraform apply. Returns risk assessment (allow/warn/escalate/block) and recoverability information. Use this to prevent unrecoverable infrastructure changes.

plan_json.description: The Terraform plan JSON output (from 'terraform show -json plan.out')

state_json.description: Optional: Terraform state JSON for improved accuracy

name: recourse_evaluate_shell
description: Evaluate a shell command for destructive consequences BEFORE execution. Use this for commands like 'aws s3 rm', 'kubectl delete', 'rm -rf', 'DROP TABLE', etc. Returns risk assessment and whether to proceed.

command.description: The shell command to evaluate (e.g., 'aws s3 rm s3://bucket --recursive')

name: recourse_evaluate_mcp
description: Evaluate an MCP tool call for destructive consequences BEFORE invocation. Use this before calling MCP tools that delete or modify cloud resources.
